title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS504-4XQ-IN
description: Optical Cloud Router Switch CRS504-4XQ-IN is a suitable 19" rackmount solution for access to 100 Gbps networks and as a small central optical switch that offers 4x QSFP28 s at 100 Gbps, 1x Ethernet port with support for passive PoE power supply and console RJ45 port.The switch can be powered via two redundant Hot-swap sources , DC connector/DC terminal block (36 - 57V DC), as well as via an Ethernet port supporting passive PoE with a voltage of 43 - 57V DC.The maximum power consumption of the… (4) 100G (QSFP28) (1) 10/100 /1000Mbps ethernet - with PoE IN support (43 - 57V DC) (1) console RJ45 port QCA9531 processor, 650 MHz frequency, Mipsbe 64MB RAM 16MB storage RouterOS v7 Level 5 operating system Wide range of power options - 2Ã redundant power supply, PoE, DC connector, DC terminal block (1) Device (2) Power cord (1) 19" rack mounts
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Optical interfaces (4) 100G Serial port RJ45 Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 43 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector, DC terminal, Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-In (only) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 25 Power via connector/terminal 36 .. 57V DC, 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Desktop, Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 320 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 185 Hardware CPU QCA9531 CPU frequency [MHz] 650 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 64
